---
name: "🛡️ Security Vulnerability"
about: Report a security concern privately.
title: "[SECURITY] <Short description>"
labels: security
assignees: ''

---

## ⚠️ CAUTION
If this is a critical vulnerability that could lead to data loss or system takeover, please **do not open a public issue**. 

### 🛡️ Vulnerability Detail
A clear and concise description of the security concern.

### 🛑 Potential Impact
What is the worst-case scenario if this is exploited?

### 🚀 Proof of Concept
(Optional) Steps to reproduce the vulnerability. Please keep this as minimal as possible.

### 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context here.
